blueprints.title: Review general git diff
blueprints.goal: Review code changes from the current git diff before merging.

preconditions.description: A git diff or changed files are available for inspection.

steps.title: Scan scope
steps.instruction: Read git diff --stat and identify the files and subsystems touched by the patch.

steps.title: Inspect risks
steps.instruction: Read the changed source and tests to verify invariants, side effects, and regression risks.

steps.title: Report findings
steps.instruction: Summarize blocking issues, non-blocking issues, and the final review verdict with concrete evidence.

branches.condition: If behavior changes but no test covers the changed path, raise it as a review concern.

expectedEvidence.description: Diff scope and changed files were inspected.
Source or tests were inspected for regressions.
A final review verdict was reported.

failureModes.title: Review too shallow
failureModes.mitigation: Read the changed source and tests before reporting a verdict.

failureModes.title: Missed regression risk
failureModes.mitigation: Explicitly inspect behavior changes, affected tests, and subsystem boundaries.
